jobDescription: The Client Services Specialist will be working with well-known global banks and financial institutions to help them maximize value gained from using Capitolis platforms. Responsibilities: This management position focuses on both business and technical application for our global clients. The successful candidate will be managing all related to New Clients and Existing clients projects, have great communication and organizational skills, and be able to work independently to resolve clients’ issues, follow up on issues from start to end. Previous experience in project management and related position will be considered an advantage. Qualifications & Experience: BA/ BS in Business/ Finance / Economics / Computer Science. Experience in the financial industry in a technical/application role. Excellent spoken and written English communication skills – a MUST.
